name: proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_dll_sideload_defender
raw_query: any where (process.executable like~ ("*\\MpCmdRun.exe", "*\\NisSrv.exe")) and (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Security Client\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*")))
